title: TW Stocks Daily Report — Manifest
description: Single-call index for mobile/web clients. Lists all available reports and AI commentary dates without needing to enumerate directories via the GitHub Contents API.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the manifest was produced.

schema_version.description: Semver string. Breaking changes will bump the major number.

reports.description: Available daily report dates, newest first.

ai_commentary_dates.description: Dates that have an ai_commentary/<date>.json snapshot.
